name: memory-claw
description: 100% autonomous multilingual OpenClaw plugin for memory capture and recall via LanceDB + Mistral Embeddings. v2.4.33: CRITICAL FIX - Disabled SKIP_PATTERNS and LOW_VALUE_PATTERNS that were blocking all messages due to role prefix matching (user:, assistant:, system:). Root cause found: patterns matched message prefixes, rejecting legitimate content.
author: duan78
